name: cost-calculator
description: Modern cost calculator website with Next.js 16 frontend and NestJS backend.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cost-calculator/shared && npm run build --workspace @cost-calculator/api && npm run build --workspace @cost-calculator/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @cost-calculator/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @cost-calculator/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @cost-calculator/web
